metadata.description: Batch 35 — additional Oxford 5000 words 401-500; continuing IDs after Batch 34

words.definitionEn: an accepted practice or a large formal meeting
words.definitionTh: ธรรมเนียม / การประชุม
words.example: The report uses “convention” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: following accepted or traditional methods
words.definitionTh: ตามธรรมเนียม
words.example: The report uses “conventional” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the process of changing into another form
words.example: The conversion changed the signal into digital data.

words.definitionEn: to communicate or transport something
words.example: The dashboard conveys the risk clearly.

words.definitionEn: to officially find someone guilty of a crime
words.definitionTh: ตัดสินว่ามีความผิด
words.example: The report uses “convict” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a strong belief or a formal guilty judgment
words.definitionTh: ความเชื่อมั่น / คำพิพากษา
words.example: The report uses “conviction” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: able to make someone believe something
words.definitionTh: น่าเชื่อถือ
words.example: The trial produced convincing evidence.

words.definitionEn: to work together toward a shared result
words.example: Production and engineering must cooperate.

words.definitionEn: willing to work with others
words.definitionTh: ที่ร่วมมือกัน
words.example: The report uses “cooperative” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to organize people or activities to work together
words.example: The project owner coordinates all testing activities.

words.definitionEn: the organization of connected activities
words.definitionTh: การประสานงาน
words.example: Good coordination reduced downtime.

words.definitionEn: a person who organizes related activities
words.definitionTh: ผู้ประสานงาน
words.example: The report uses “coordinator” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an informal word for a police officer
words.example: The report uses “cop” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to manage a difficult situation successfully
words.example: The system can cope with high line speed.

words.definitionEn: a reddish metal that conducts electricity well
words.example: Use copper wire for the connection.

words.definitionEn: the legal right to control use of original work
words.example: The report uses “copyright” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a large company recognized as a legal entity
words.example: The report uses “corporation” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a change that makes something accurate
words.example: Apply the correction before recalculation.

words.definitionEn: to show a relationship between two things
words.definitionTh: มีความสัมพันธ์กัน
words.example: Defects correlate with high vibration.

words.definitionEn: a measurable relationship between variables
words.definitionTh: ความสัมพันธ์
words.example: The analysis found a strong correlation.

words.definitionEn: to match or communicate by writing
words.definitionTh: สอดคล้อง / ติดต่อ
words.example: The measured value corresponds to the standard.

words.definitionEn: written communication or close agreement
words.definitionTh: การติดต่อ / จดหมาย
words.example: The report uses “correspondence” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a person who reports news from a place
words.definitionTh: ผู้สื่อข่าว
words.example: The report uses “correspondent” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: matching or directly related
words.definitionTh: ที่สอดคล้องกัน
words.example: The report uses “corresponding” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a long passage connecting rooms or areas
words.example: The report uses “corridor” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: dishonest or changed from its correct form
words.example: The report uses “corrupt” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: dishonest conduct or damaging alteration
words.example: The report uses “corruption” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: expensive or causing serious loss
words.definitionTh: มีค่าใช้จ่ายสูง
words.example: The report uses “costly” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an elected member of a local council
words.example: The report uses “councilor” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: professional advice and emotional support
words.definitionTh: การให้คำปรึกษา
words.example: The report uses “counseling” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a person who gives guidance or advice
words.example: The report uses “counselor” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a flat work surface or to argue against
words.definitionTh: เคาน์เตอร์ / โต้แย้ง
words.example: The report uses “counter” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a person or thing with a similar role elsewhere
words.example: The report uses “counterpart” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: too many to be counted
words.definitionTh: นับไม่ถ้วน
words.example: The report uses “countless” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a sudden illegal seizure of government power
words.example: The report uses “coup” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: polite behavior and respect for others
words.example: The report uses “courtesy” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the amount or range included or reported
words.definitionTh: การครอบคลุม
words.example: Check the camera coverage area.

words.definitionEn: a person who works with cattle
words.example: The report uses “cowboy” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a narrow break or to split without separating fully
words.definitionTh: รอยแตก / แตกร้าว
words.example: The camera detected a small crack.

words.definitionEn: skill in making things; to make carefully
words.definitionTh: งานฝีมือ / ประดิษฐ์
words.example: Craft a clear technical proposal.

words.definitionEn: to move slowly on hands and knees or close to a surface
words.example: The report uses “crawl” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the ability to produce original ideas
words.definitionTh: ความคิดสร้างสรรค์
words.example: The solution required engineering creativity.

words.definitionEn: a person who makes something new
words.example: The report uses “creator” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being trusted and believed
words.definitionTh: ความน่าเชื่อถือ
words.example: Traceable data improves credibility.

words.definitionEn: believable and worthy of trust
words.definitionTh: น่าเชื่อถือ
words.example: The report uses “credible” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to move slowly and quietly
words.example: The report uses “creep” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: in a way that carefully judges quality or is extremely important
words.definitionTh: อย่างมีวิจารณญาณ
words.example: Review the evidence critically.

words.definitionEn: a detailed analysis and judgment of something
words.example: The team prepared a design critique.

words.definitionEn: a royal headpiece or the top part of something
words.example: The report uses “crown” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: rough, basic, or not refined
words.example: The first prototype was crude but functional.

words.definitionEn: a holiday journey by ship or to travel steadily
words.example: The report uses “cruise” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to press or break with strong force
words.example: Do not crush the cable under the frame.

words.definitionEn: a clear mineral solid with a regular structure
words.example: The report uses “crystal” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a signal indicating that an action should begin
words.example: The PLC signal is the cue to start inspection.

words.definitionEn: a small group with unusual beliefs or intense devotion
words.example: The report uses “cult” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to grow crops or develop a skill or quality
words.definitionTh: เพาะปลูก / พัฒนา
words.example: The program cultivates a safety culture.

words.definitionEn: a strong desire to know or learn
words.definitionTh: ความอยากรู้อยากเห็น
words.example: Technical curiosity supports innovation.

words.definitionEn: wanting to know or learn something
words.definitionTh: อยากรู้อยากเห็น
words.example: The report uses “curious” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the subjects and content taught in a course
words.example: The curriculum includes machine vision.

words.definitionEn: legal care, control, or protection of someone
words.definitionTh: การควบคุมดูแล
words.example: The report uses “custody” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: attractive in a pleasant or childlike way
words.example: The report uses “cute” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the act of cutting or a piece cut from a plant
words.definitionTh: การตัด / กิ่งชำ
words.example: The report uses “cutting” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: doubting that people act for sincere reasons
words.definitionTh: มองโลกในแง่ร้าย
words.example: The report uses “cynical” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: relating to milk and milk products
words.definitionTh: ผลิตภัณฑ์นม
words.example: The sensor is suitable for dairy processing.

words.definitionEn: a barrier built to hold back water
words.example: The dam controls water flow.

words.definitionEn: causing physical or reputational harm
words.definitionTh: ก่อความเสียหาย
words.example: Excess heat is damaging to the sensor.

words.definitionEn: to be brave enough to do something risky
words.example: The report uses “dare” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the absence of light
words.example: The report uses “darkness” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an organized electronic collection of data
words.example: Store every result in the database.

words.definitionEn: the time when daylight first appears
words.example: The report uses “dawn” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the latest time by which work must be finished
words.example: The installation deadline is Friday.

words.definitionEn: likely to cause death or extreme harm
words.example: The report uses “deadly” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a person or business that buys and sells goods
words.example: The report uses “dealer” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: scattered pieces left after damage or destruction
words.definitionTh: ซากปรักหักพัง
words.example: The report uses “debris” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a first public appearance or performance
words.definitionTh: การเปิดตัว
words.example: The report uses “debut” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the process of choosing between options
words.definitionTh: การตัดสินใจ
words.example: Reliable data supports decision-making.

words.definitionEn: able to decide quickly or producing a clear result
words.example: The test provided decisive evidence.

words.definitionEn: a floor of a ship or a flat outdoor platform
words.definitionTh: ดาดฟ้า / ชั้น
words.example: The report uses “deck” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an official or public statement
words.example: The report uses “declaration” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: committed to a task or reserved for one use
words.example: Use a dedicated network for the cameras.

words.definitionEn: strong commitment to a purpose
words.definitionTh: ความทุ่มเท
words.example: The report uses “dedication” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an action or a legal ownership document
words.example: The report uses “deed” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to consider something to have a particular quality
words.example: The report uses “deem” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a preset option or failure to meet an obligation
words.definitionTh: ค่าเริ่มต้น / ผิดนัด
words.example: Review the default camera settings.

words.definitionEn: a fault that makes something imperfect
words.definitionTh: ข้อบกพร่อง
words.example: The camera detected a wooden-stick defect.

words.definitionEn: a person who protects someone or something
words.definitionTh: ผู้ป้องกัน
words.example: The report uses “defender” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: intended to protect or reacting to criticism
words.definitionTh: เชิงป้องกัน
words.example: The report uses “defensive” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a lack of something necessary
words.definitionTh: การขาดแคลน
words.example: The audit identified a lighting deficiency.

words.definitionEn: an amount by which spending or need exceeds supply
words.example: The project has a budget deficit.

words.definitionEn: to openly resist or refuse to obey
words.example: The report uses “defy” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a representative or to assign responsibility
words.definitionTh: ผู้แทน / มอบหมาย
words.example: Delegate each action to an owner.

words.definitionEn: a group of representatives or assignment of authority
words.example: The report uses “delegation” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to remove data or text
words.example: Do not delete the raw data.

words.definitionEn: easily damaged or requiring careful handling
words.example: Handle the delicate lens carefully.

words.definitionEn: very pleased
words.example: The report uses “delighted” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a system of government chosen by the people
words.definitionTh: ประชาธิปไตย
words.example: The report uses “democracy” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: based on equal participation or elected government
words.definitionTh: ตามระบอบประชาธิปไตย
words.example: The report uses “democratic” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an evil spirit in stories or religion
words.example: The report uses “demon” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a public display, protest, or explanation
words.example: The supplier gave a system demonstration.

words.definitionEn: a statement that something is not true
words.example: The report uses “denial” in a clear context.
